name: @omadia/memory-postgres
description: Postgres-backed memory store (PostgresMemoryStore) for the byte5 Harness — a drop-in alternative to @omadia/memory's FilesystemMemoryStore. Ships as a kind:extension plugin that reuses the shared 'graphPool' service (from @omadia/knowledge-graph-neon), runs its own schema migrations, and provides the 'memoryStore' service + the Anthropic-native 'memory' tool handler + the startup seeder. Structurally mutually exclusive with @omadia/memory — both declare memoryStore@1.
